title: Nocturnal Sweeping Bokgak and Additions to Some Tools

texts: Added the new content from the Nocturnal Sweeping Bokgak and Extreme MD update (identity, E.G.O, gifts, theme packs, choice events, fusions). New encounters to follow.

Added the ability to use company data to set the black/white list in the Team Solver and Randomizer tools. The black/white list toggle buttons have been changed from an active/inactive toggle to a show/hide toggle, and the number of items currently on the list has been added to the button.
Added an exclusive gifts helper section to the Floor Planner. Selecting exclusive gifts will show all the theme packs where you can get those gifts, sorted by the number of selected gifts they have.
Added a new and updated section to the gifts page.
Changed encounter tooltips to show all the enemies found in that encounter instead of only the final wave or phase.

Added boss encounters to theme packs page. Only the theme packs with bosses I've managed to add to the encounters page will have encounters listed. The rest will be updated once I'm able to add more encounters.
Extended the text in the Team Solver when using fixed identities/E.G.Os. It now shows the full E.G.O rank instead of only the first letter.
Updated some md achievement tips to use the relevant tokens on the site.
Changed the style of username tokens to also follow other links on the site, similar to other token links like identities and E.G.Os.

Added a small handler to potentially fix certain errors that can pop up when I update the site. This is due to browsers sometimes only partially downloading the new site and using old cached versions of some parts which causes crashes. Manually clearing the cache would potentially fix this issue, but this added code will forcefully try to reload the page if it detects the issue.
